_publications._publicationTitle: Development of a Novel Biomarker Platform for Profiling Key Protein-Protein Interactions to Predict the Efficacy of BH3-Mimetic Drugs.

_contextSnippet: Purified leukocyte populations were immunophenotyped for the AML blast cell population and the MFI within both the blast population used for measuring PRIMAB binding
details: Used for flow cytometry data analysis in PRIMAB detection assays and patient sample analysis
